title: Gluecklichness
description: enhances vanilla Minecraft for multiplayer, improving performance and visuals while also introducing quality-of-life features. It focuses on a smoother gameplay experience while preserving the game’s original charm.
body:
# Overview:
The Gluecklichness modpack is designed for players seeking an enhanced yet authentic Minecraft experience. Created for an annual multiplayer server, it features a carefully selected array of mods that improve performance, graphics, and comfort while maintaining the classic vanilla feel.

### Performance Optimizations:

- Sodium: Significantly boosts FPS and reduces load times with optimized rendering techniques.
- Lithium: Enhances both server and client performance by optimizing the game engine.
- Entity Culling: Renders only visible entities to further improve performance.

### Graphics and Shaders:

- Iris Shaders: Enables impressive lighting and shadow effects.
- Complementary: Add realistic lighting and soft shadows, enhancing the game's visual appeal.

### Quality of Life Improvements:

- Mouse Tweaks: Streamlines inventory management.
- Inventory Profiles Next: Easily organizes your inventory and chests.
- JourneyMap: Provides a real-time map and waypoint system.
- VanillaTweaks: Provides a lot of small fixes to textures in the game.
You can customize and download your prefered version on [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/).

### Additional Features:

- Shulker Box Tooltip: Displays contents of Shulker Boxes without opening them.
- Simple Voice Chat: Facilitates in-game communication for improved multiplayer interaction.
- Cubes Without Borders: Allows to play the game in borderless fullscreen.
- & more small tweaking mods.

# Why Gluecklichness?
The Gluecklichness modpack combines a thoughtfully curated collection of mods that ensure a smooth and enjoyable multiplayer experience. It caters to players who want to maximize their Minecraft adventure while retaining the charm of the original game. Whether you’re embarking on new quests or tackling existing challenges, this modpack provides the perfect tools for your journey.
